name: feishu2codex
description: Community Codex plugin packaging lark-cli skills for Feishu and Lark workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use Lark and Feishu from Codex through lark-cli skills.
interface.longDescription: Adds the official lark-cli skill set plus a guided setup workflow. Codex can install the matching runtime on first use, open browser/device OAuth, inspect scopes, and operate Lark/Feishu domains such as Messenger, Docs, Sheets, Base, Calendar, Tasks, Meetings, Mail, Approval, OKR, and Drive.
defaultPrompt: Set up and connect Feishu/Lark to Codex.
Check my Lark tasks and approvals.
